title: Wood+
description: A modpack that adds new wooden-based blocks, so crafting tables have warped variants and so on.
body:
## **_Why do crafting tables always look like they're made of oak? And lecterns, and sticks, and beds, and so on..._**

But this modpack fixes it all. Nearly all items made of wood now have more textures based on their wood types.

Thanks to LieOnLion Studios for the mods!

## **Features so far:**
- Crafting Tables
- Chests
- Cartography Tables
- Beds
- Smokers (Different stone types too!)
- Composters
- Chisseled Bookshelves
- Furnaces (Bonus mod)
- Shields (Custom patterns available too, check in mod menu)
- Beehives
- Smithing Tables
- Jukeboxes
- Noteblocks
- Barrels
- Crafters
- Lecterns
- Looms
  Sticks
- Fishing Rods
- Torches
- Armour stands

Thanks!
Any suggestions email mrtedlloyd@gmail.com
